name: red_flag_check
description: Verify a stated figure or claim against published benchmarks. Triggers: a deposit stated for a named university (check_type deposit + university + amount); free/zero-fee counselling or both sweeps done (total_charges); a visa/admission guarantee (guarantee_claim + detail); pay-today or last-seat pressure (pressure_claim + detail). If the response contains a 'say' line, say it verbatim as your next sentence.

request_body_schema.description: One check per call — the server owns the benchmark figures.

call_id.description: The call reference from the system prompt ({{call_id}})

check_type.description: One of: deposit, total_charges, guarantee_claim, pressure_claim

university.description: deposit check only: the university the deposit is for, as the consultant named it

amount.description: deposit check only: the deposit amount they quoted, digits only

detail.description: guarantee_claim / pressure_claim: the claim in the consultant's own words, verbatim
